message:
Revert "feat: add path constraints for agent file access"

This reverts commit 10a9eeedc24b35dff395fd5a4af5e7e6fb70ddf7.

files.patch:
@@ -12,8 +12,6 @@ constraints:
   max_depth: 0
   can_spawn: false
   timeout_ms: 120000
-  allowed_write_paths:
-    - "~/.local/share/sprout-genome/capability-index.yaml"
 tags:
   - quartermaster
   - discovery
